name: Scholé
tagline: Turn everyday work into personalized AI learning
description: Most AI learning is disconnected from the work people actually need to do. Scholé changes that by giving professionals and teams personalized, task-based learning in real time, right in the flow of work. Grounded in learning science and powered by adaptive AI, Scholé helps learners practice, improve, and apply AI skills as they work so learning is more relevant, more effective, and immediately useful.

name: Cloud Computer by Manus
tagline: A dedicated cloud machine for bots and software
description: Manus Cloud Computer gives you a persistent machine in the cloud to run bots, Python scripts, apps, databases, and scheduled jobs 24/7. No DevOps, no server setup, no coding required. Just describe what you want to build, and keep it running around the clock.

name: Feather
tagline: Photo editor with local AI
description: Your photos stay on your machine, AI generative infill, AI magic selection and smart stacking are all processed offline on your Apple Silicon Mac. The UI is modern and designed to be intuitive. It's pay once to use forever

name: Microsoft Copilot Health
tagline: Dedicated space to bring your personal health data together
description: You've got data from your Oura, your hospital, your blood panels. None of it talks to each other. None of it tells you what to do. Copilot Health fixes that. It's a secure space inside Copilot where your health records (50,000+ US health systems), wearables (50+ devices), and lab results (via Function) come together. Medical AI analyzes the full picture and surfaces insights you can act on, grounded in sources like Harvard Health.

name: YouTube TV Custom Multiview
tagline: Mix and match up to 4 live streams at once
description: YouTube TV now lets subscribers build fully customizable multiviews with up to four live streams on one screen. Mix and match live channels across your plan and add-ons like NFL Sunday Ticket, using a new builder with filters for sports, news, shows, movies, and more.

name: Breaks
tagline: A quiet Pomodoro that lives in your menu bar.
description: A small, focused Pomodoro app that lives in your Mac menu bar. Free, open source, sandboxed. Focus journal, streaks, global hotkeys, optional Calendar export, and on-device AI weekly review powered by Apple Intelligence, your data never leaves your Mac.

name: Ara
tagline: Build an entire business by texting
description: Paste an Image to get a website with payments supported. Remove all the friction of setup and sourcing. Get a live domain, real website with payments. And continue to scale on your phone natively. Continue and add full backends/custom domains and much more.

name: Filect
tagline: Organize Your Files With AI
description: Filect automatically organizes your files into clean folder structures using AI. You can run it on autopilot or set custom rules, either way, your Desktop, Downloads, and Documents stay clean without lifting a finger. It can also find any specific file instantly. Just describe it in plain English "that invoice I made for client X last Tuesday" and Filect finds it in seconds. Built for creators, coders, designers, video editors, drowning in files. Mac and Windows. Free 10-day trial.

name: explainx ai
tagline: discover & monetize ai skills, agents, tools & mcp servers
description: ExplainX.ai is the hub where AI practitioners find everything they need — 10,000+ agent skills, 2,000+ MCP servers, 100,000+ AI tools, agents, LLMs, courses, and news, all ranked by real adoption. Built something? Publish your skill, agent, or MCP server on ExplainX and get discovered by thousands of builders. Free to list, open to the community.

name: BookstoRead.ai
tagline: Life’s too short for boring books. Let AI find your match
description: BookstoRead.ai is a new kind of discovery engine. Describe what you’re looking for in plain English, and our AI finds the books that fit your specific intent. We move beyond generic bestseller lists to find the reads that actually stick with you.

name: Sakyura
tagline: See who AI recommends in your category
description: Sakyura measures how often your brand is cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Overviews — every day. See competitor share of voice, auto-generate fix-it content, and track AI-driven traffic in one tool.

name: Spredly
tagline: Talk to your spreadsheets directly, use local LLMs or Claude
description: Spredly is a modern spreadsheet experience built for people who want the speed of AI without giving up the familiarity of rows, columns, formulas, and exports. You can import data, chat with your spreadsheet in plain English, generate charts, and turn raw tables into useful dashboards in minutes. Unlike generic AI assistants that sit outside your workflow, Spredly works directly inside the spreadsheet experience.

name: AI Workflow Genarator
tagline: Generate complete AI workflows from a single input
description: AI Workflow Generator creates complete, step-by-step workflows from a single input. Enter a task or keyword, and it generates: - A structured workflow - Prompts for each step - Example outputs Designed for SEO, marketing, coding, and other real-world tasks. Instead of collecting prompts, you get a full workflow you can follow or reuse.

name: LazySEO
tagline: Go from keyword to ranking content in minutes
description: LazySEO researches keywords, writes 2,500-word SEO articles, and publishes them to your site daily — fully automated. Rank on Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini. First 3 posts for $1

name: AI Sales Operator
tagline: AI that runs your entire eCommerce sales process 24/7
description: AI Sales Operator automates routine eCommerce sales operations: order confirmation, CRM status updates, customer notifications, unpaid order recovery, post-sale support, no-show reduction, review collection, and AI-powered customer communication. It helps online stores reduce manager workload and run sales processes 24/7

name: Il Frullatore Carlà (Buffett-style App)
tagline: A revolutionary app: a Buffett-style analysis in two minutes
description: My app is built on a proprietary system that incorporates over 35 years of analytical methodology. The quality of the output depends by skills that require decades of practical experience to develop. “Anyone can ask a general-purpose AI to analyze a company,” says Carlà. “What they get is a superficial analysis. What makes the difference is what’s inside the system—and that’s the result of thirty-five years of work.”

name: fossel
tagline: Local MCP memory server for persistent AI context repos
description: Fossel is a local MCP memory server for open-source contributors. It gives AI tools like Cursor and Claude Desktop persistent, repo-aware memory — storing conventions, bug fixes, reviewer patterns, and decisions in a local SQLite database. Tools included: update_memory, pin_memory, unpin_memory, and summarize_repo_context. No cloud. No account. Just run npx -y fossel init and you're live in 30s.

name: Palabros
tagline: A dictionary that keeps words in widgets until they stick
description: Palabros is a thoughtfully designed dictionary that helps words stay with you. Look up a word, read the official definition, get a clearer plain explanation, save it, and keep it in widgets until it sticks. It also includes Word of the Day, review games, optional bilingual mode, and a calm, ad-free experience built for understanding and remembering words.

name: RepoRose
tagline: Start new claude chat with full context without using tokens
description: One small file. Total context for your AI agent. RepoRose generates structured codebase maps that cut tokens by ~90% and stop your AI from re-reading the repo whenever you start a new chat.

name: Wipe for Reddit
tagline: Bulk delete your Reddit history. 100% Private
description: Wipe for Reddit lets you browse, search, filter, and permanently delete your Reddit posts and comments, all from a desktop app that runs entirely on your machine. 100% private, no servers, no cloud, no data collection. See everything you've posted, filter by subreddit, sort by karma or date, and delete what you don't want anymore. Supports unlimited deletes, bulk operations, and JSON export. Available on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Scholé changes that by giving professionals and teams personalized, task-based learning in real time, right in the flow of work.
